rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks for component ports must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
generic_rules: Preserve AADL scope rules when inserting AGREE annex blocks into component types or implementations
Use valid variables or outputs to represent subcomponent ports in component type contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must align helper declaration types with expression types (bool, int, real)
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level AGREE bindings in component type scopes
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
